name: web-fetch
description: Pi extension: fetch web pages and return clean markdown content

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && tsc && bun build --production --minify --target=node --external @mozilla/readability --external jsdom --external turndown ./src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/web-fetch
scripts.preinstall: mkdir -p dist && bun build --production --minify --target=node --external @mozilla/readability --external jsdom --external turndown ./src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/web-fetch
